| <a id="storage-tapelibrary-version" href="#storage-tapelibrary-version">`storage.tapelibrary.version`</a> | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | string | Indicates the firmware version of the tape library. | `3.7.0`; `8.2.1` |

**[1] `storage.ip_port.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[2] `storage.ip_port.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.

**[3] `storage.node.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[4] `storage.node.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.

**[5] `storage.system.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[6] `storage.system.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.
